item.name: Classic Eggs Benedict
item.description: Two poached free-range eggs on toasted English muffin with hollandaise sauce and your choice of bacon or spinach.

item.name: Avocado Smash
item.description: Smashed avocado on sourdough toast with feta, cherry tomatoes, lemon and chilli flakes.

item.name: Buttermilk Pancakes
item.description: Three fluffy pancakes stacked with maple syrup, mixed berries and a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

item.name: Bryan's Signature Burger
item.description: House-made beef patty, aged cheddar, caramelised onion, baby cos and chipotle aioli on a brioche bun. Served with fries.

item.name: Roasted Pumpkin Salad
item.description: Roasted pumpkin, baby spinach, quinoa, pomegranate, goat cheese and toasted pepitas with citrus dressing.

item.name: Grilled Chicken Wrap
item.description: Marinated grilled chicken, mixed leaves, tomato, avocado and garlic aioli wrapped in a soft tortilla.

item.name: Single Origin Espresso
item.description: Daily-rotating single origin beans, expertly extracted to highlight unique tasting notes.

item.name: Flat White
item.description: Double shot of our house blend with velvety steamed milk - an Australian classic.

item.name: Iced Mocha
item.description: Cold brew espresso, dark Belgian chocolate and chilled milk over ice, finished with cocoa dust.

item.name: Tiramisu
item.description: Classic Italian tiramisu with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream and cocoa.

item.name: Salted Caramel Cheesecake
item.description: Smooth baked cheesecake on a biscuit base, drizzled with house-made salted caramel.
